description_long: This motorcycle features a classic retro design with a teardrop-shaped fuel tank painted in a two-tone blue and white scheme. The seat is long, ribbed, and upholstered in brown leather, providing comfort for both rider and passenger. Chrome accents are visible on the exhaust pipes, engine casing, and rearview mirrors, adding a polished touch to the overall look. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with a round headlamp, flanked by orange turn signals, and a set of analog gauges mounted above the handlebars. The rear includes a visible license plate, taillight, and turn signals, with a rear fender that matches the vintage aesthetic. The wheels are spoked, and the tires are moderately thick, suitable for urban and light touring use.
description: A retro-styled motorcycle with a blue and white fuel tank, brown ribbed seat, chrome accents, and spoked wheels. It features classic round headlamp, analog gauges, and a visible license plate.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the brown ribbed seat, taillight, license plate, and chrome exhaust pipes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-tone fuel tank, engine details, long seat, and spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the round headlamp, front fender, analog gauges, and handlebars.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, exhaust system, and the full length of the seat and tank.
